description: Flexible fiberscope + coherent image bundle: eyepiece body w/ articulation wheels, S-bend insertion tube to lit distal tip over a cracked part; magnified single-fiber cutaway (CORE/CLADDING, TIR ray drawing bounce-by-bounce, continuing around the bend); small entry face and large hex-mosaic exit face showing the dotted crack image, color-coded same-position mapping, one-fiber-one-pixel highlight, dead fibers and a snapped fiber as permanent black dots.
